text:
SymphonicSuite[AoT]Part1-2nd:一s十りA is the 4th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

The Japanese numbers 一 (one) and 十 (ten) can be read as "hito" (abbreviated "hi") and "to", respectively. Including the hiragana り (ri), the title is a homophone for hi-s-to-ri-a, a reference to Historia Reiss.

Musical motifs

The track is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:00-2:02) is an uplifting string melody, while the second (2:05-3:47) is a classical harpsichord and cello duet.

All occurrences

Episode 43 - Frieda's story
Episode 47 - Historia is crowned Queen
Episode 57 - Jaeger tries to teach Grisha the Marley version of Eldian history (2nd part)
Episode 59 - The Scouts head outside the Walls
Episode 74 - Xaver's tragic past
